001package net.okocraft.box.api;
002
003import com.github.siroshun09.configapi.yaml.YamlConfiguration;
004import com.github.siroshun09.event4j.bus.EventBus;
005import net.okocraft.box.api.command.base.BoxAdminCommand;
006import net.okocraft.box.api.command.base.BoxCommand;
007import net.okocraft.box.api.feature.BoxFeature;
008import net.okocraft.box.api.model.data.CustomDataContainer;
009import net.okocraft.box.api.model.manager.ItemManager;
010import net.okocraft.box.api.model.manager.StockManager;
011import net.okocraft.box.api.model.manager.UserManager;
012import net.okocraft.box.api.player.BoxPlayerMap;
013import net.okocraft.box.api.taskfactory.TaskFactory;
014import net.okocraft.box.api.util.ExecutorProvider;
015import org.bukkit.NamespacedKey;
016import org.bukkit.command.CommandSender;
017import org.bukkit.entity.Player;
018import org.bukkit.plugin.Plugin;
019import org.jetbrains.annotations.ApiStatus;
020import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
021import org.jetbrains.annotations.Unmodifiable;
022
023import java.nio.file.Path;
024import java.util.List;
025import java.util.logging.Logger;
026
027/**
028 * An API of Box.
029 */
030public interface BoxAPI {
031
032    /**
033     * Gets the instance of Box.
034     * <p>
035     * This is intended for operations that require a plugin instance.
036     *
037     * @return the plugin instance
038     */
039    @NotNull Plugin getPluginInstance();
040
041    /**
042     * Gets the path of the plugin directory.
043     *
044     * @return the path of the plugin directory
045     */
046    @NotNull Path getPluginDirectory();
047
048    /**
049     * Gets the path of the plugin jar.
050     *
051     * @return tha path of the plugin jar
052     */
053    @NotNull Path getJar();
054
055    /**
056     * Gets the {@link Logger}.
057     *
058     * @return the {@link Logger}
059     */
060    @NotNull Logger getLogger();
061
062    /**
063     * Gets the {@link YamlConfiguration} that loaded from config.yml.
064     *
065     * @return the {@link YamlConfiguration}
066     */
067    @NotNull YamlConfiguration getConfiguration();
068
069    /**
070     * Gets the {@link UserManager}.
071     *
072     * @return the {@link UserManager}
073     */
074    @NotNull UserManager getUserManager();
075
076    /**
077     * Gets the {@link ItemManager}.
078     *
079     * @return the {@link ItemManager}
080     */
081    @NotNull ItemManager getItemManager();
082
083    /**
084     * Gets the {@link StockManager}.
085     *
086     * @return the {@link StockManager}
087     */
088    @NotNull StockManager getStockManager();
089
090    /**
091     * Gets the {@link BoxPlayerMap}.
092     *
093     * @return the {@link BoxPlayerMap}
094     */
095    @NotNull BoxPlayerMap getBoxPlayerMap();
096
097    /**
098     * Gets the {@link EventBus}.
099     *
100     * @return the {@link EventBus}
101     */
102    @NotNull EventBus getEventBus();
103
104    /**
105     * Gets the {@link CustomDataContainer}.
106     *
107     * @return the {@link CustomDataContainer}
108     */
109    @NotNull CustomDataContainer getCustomDataContainer();
110
111    /**
112     * Gets the {@link TaskFactory}.
113     *
114     * @return the {@link TaskFactory}
115     */
116    @NotNull TaskFactory getTaskFactory();
117
118    /**
119     * Gets the {@link ExecutorProvider}.
120     *
121     * @return the {@link ExecutorProvider}
122     */
123    @Deprecated(forRemoval = true)
124    @ApiStatus.ScheduledForRemoval(inVersion = "4.2.0")
125    @NotNull ExecutorProvider getExecutorProvider();
126
127    /**
128     * Gets the {@link BoxCommand}.
129     *
130     * @return the {@link BoxCommand}
131     */
132    @NotNull BoxCommand getBoxCommand();
133
134    /**
135     * Gets the {@link BoxAdminCommand}.
136     *
137     * @return the {@link BoxAdminCommand}
138     */
139    @NotNull BoxAdminCommand getBoxAdminCommand();
140
141    /**
142     * Gets registered {@link BoxFeature}s.
143     *
144     * @return registered {@link BoxFeature}
145     */
146    @NotNull @Unmodifiable List<BoxFeature> getFeatures();
147
148    /**
149     * Registers the {@link BoxFeature}.
150     *
151     * @param boxFeature the {@link BoxFeature} to register
152     */
153    void register(@NotNull BoxFeature boxFeature);
154
155    /**
156     * Unregisters the {@link BoxFeature}.
157     *
158     * @param boxFeature the {@link BoxFeature} to unregister
159     */
160    void unregister(@NotNull BoxFeature boxFeature);
161
162    /**
163     * Reloads box and registered {@link BoxFeature}s.
164     * <p>
165     * This method reloads some settings of Box (such as language and disabled world)
166     * and the {@link BoxFeature} in which {@link net.okocraft.box.api.feature.Reloadable} is implemented.
167     *
168     * @param sender the sender who executed reload
169     */
170    void reload(@NotNull CommandSender sender);
171
172    /**
173     * Checks if Box is not available in the world.
174     * <p>
175     * Returns false if the player has the {@code box.admin.ignore-disabled-world} permission.
176     *
177     * @param player the player to check
178     * @return if Box is disabled in that world, returns {@code true}, otherwise {@code false}
179     */
180    boolean isDisabledWorld(@NotNull Player player);
181
182    /**
183     * Creates a {@link NamespacedKey}.
184     *
185     * @param value the value of the {@link NamespacedKey}
186     * @return a new {@link NamespacedKey}
187     */
188    @NotNull NamespacedKey createNamespacedKey(@NotNull String value);
189}
